sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'
import { Box, Button, Image, Drawer, DrawerOverlay, DrawerCloseButton, useDisclosure, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, Input, DrawerBody, DrawerFooter  } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import img from '../Assets/background.jpg'

function DrawerExample() {
    const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure()
    const btnRef = React.useRef()
    return (
      <>
        <Button sx={{bottom:150, position}} ref={btnRef} colorScheme='teal' onClick={onOpen}>
          Open
        </Button>
        <Drawer
          isOpen={isOpen}
          placement='right'
          onClose={onClose}
          finalFocusRef={btnRef}
        >
          <DrawerOverlay />
          <DrawerContent>
            <DrawerCloseButton />
            <DrawerHeader>Create your account</DrawerHeader>
  
            <DrawerBody>
              <Input placeholder='Type here...' />
            </DrawerBody>
  
            <DrawerFooter>
              <Button variant='outline' mr={3} onClick={onClose}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button colorScheme='blue'>Save</Button>
            </DrawerFooter>
          </DrawerContent>
        </Drawer>
      </>
    )
}

const Home = () => {
  return (
    <>
        <Box id='banner' style={{width:'100%', height:878}}>
            <Image width={'100%'} height={878} alt='banner' src={img}/>
                <DrawerExample/>
        </Box>
        <Box id='' style={{width:'100%', height:878}}>

        </Box>
    </>
  )
}

export default Home
